subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is the Day wherein Thou hast ennobled the world through the advent of Him Who is the Dayspring of Thy Cause, unto Whom all things return [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی هذا یوم فیه شرفت العالم بقدوم مشرق امرک الذی یرجع الیه کل ما یرجع
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
